<diagram id="runtime-layers" name="Runtime Layer Cake"> <mxGraphModel dx="2114" dy="1785" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="800" pageHeight="600" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="L0" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="<b>Release pipeline (PRJ-031)</b><br>release_runtime.py — outermost conductor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="430" width="700" x="40" y="40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="<b>ADO PI driver (PI-143)</b><br>ado_runtime.py — drives ONE Planning Item" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="330" width="600" x="90" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="<b>Parallel pool (PI-139)</b><br>parallel_runtime.py — runs ONE phase's Work Tasks" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="500" x="140" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=12;spacingTop=6;" value="<b>Serial loop (PI-132)</b><br>coordinating_runtime.py — spawn → verify → merge ONE agent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="400" x="190" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="L4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="<b>Worker agent</b><br>agent_runtime.py + dispatcher.py<br>(the spawned Area Specialist Agent)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="300" x="240" y="310" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="CAP" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" value="Each layer composes the one inside it. Around the edges sit the substrate repositories (deterministic REST/access functions), the Agent Profile Registry (supplies each spawned agent its contract), and the concurrency locks." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="700" x="40" y="490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: Each layer composes the one inside it. Around the edges sit the substrate repositories (deterministic REST/access functions), the Agent Profile Registry (supplies each spawned agent its contract), and the concurrency locks.
